Creating every dependency inside the UI layer

que: Which benefit of dependency injection does Android explicitly call out?

It removes the need for classes

que: What happens when a class creates all its own dependencies?
options: It becomes harder to test and refactor as complexity grows

que: How does a service locator differ from DI according to Android docs?
options: Classes ask a global source for dependencies instead of receiving them explicitly
It is the exact same pattern
It is only for XML-based apps

que: Why can service locators be problematic?
options: They can hide dependencies and make testing harder

que: Which DI library does Android recommend for Android apps?
What is a common DI mistake?
options: Creating dependencies directly inside business classes

options: You can inject fake implementations instead of real dependencies

It only runs in instrumentation tests
